Shreeyam Handicrafts

Shreeyam Handicrafts is an Indian handicrafts brand focused on brass decor, wooden decor, lamps, devotional pieces, and heritage-inspired home products.

Primary site:
- https://www.shreeyamhandicraft.com/

Key pages:
- Homepage: https://www.shreeyamhandicraft.com/
- Products listing: https://www.shreeyamhandicraft.com/products

Machine-readable discovery:
- Product catalog JSON: https://www.shreeyamhandicraft.com/product-catalog.json
- Product sitemap XML: https://www.shreeyamhandicraft.com/sitemap-products.xml
- Main sitemap index: https://www.shreeyamhandicraft.com/sitemap-index.xml
- AI guide: https://www.shreeyamhandicraft.com/skills.md

Content notes:
- Product pages include title, description, category, image, pricing, features, and size options when available.
- Product catalog JSON is the easiest endpoint for AI systems and crawlers to ingest the product list.
- Sitemap files are available for search engines and indexing systems.
